zh.Stoke, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克
zh.Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Moleyns於1378年1月7日出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Richard de Moleyns25歲，母親Eleanor de Beaumont16歲。他於1405年9月29日之前與Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年6月8日在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯享年47歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Moleyns于1378年1月7日出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Richard de Moleyns25岁，母亲Eleanor de Beaumont16岁。他于1405年9月29日之前与Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年6月8日在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯享年47岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Moleyns was born on 7 January 1378, in London, England, his father, Richard de Moleyns, was 25 and his mother, Eleanor de Beaumont, was 16. He married Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens before 29 September 1405, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 June 1425, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Moleyns est né le 7 janvier 1378, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Moleyns, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Beaumont, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens avant 29 septembre 1405, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1425, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Moleyns am 7. Januar 1378 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Moleyns 25 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Beaumont 16. Er hat vor 29. September 1405 in England Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1425 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Moleyns è nato il il 7 gennaio 1378 nel London, England, il suo padre, Richard de Moleyns, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Beaumont, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens prima del 29 settembre 1405, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 8 giugno 1425, nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Moleynsが1378年1月7日にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Richard de Moleynsは25歳，母Eleanor de Beaumontは16歳であった。1405年9月29日以前にイギリスでMargery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年6月8日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズで47歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Moleyns(이)가 1378년 1월 7일 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Moleyns(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Beaumont(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1405년 9월 29일 이전 영국에서 Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 6월 8일 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Moleyns nasceu em 7 de janeiro de 1378, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Moleyns, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Beaumont, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens antes 29 de setembro de 1405, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1425, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Moleyns родился 7 января 1378 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Moleyns было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Beaumont, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens перед 29 сентябрь 1405 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 июня 1425 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Moleyns nació el 7 de enero de 1378, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Moleyns, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Beaumont, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens antes de 29 de septiembre de 1405, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 8 de junio de 1425, en Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
